member.name: M:GTA.ShapeTest.StartTestBox(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.EulerRotationOrder,GTA.IntersectFlags,GTA.Entity,GTA.ShapeTestOptions)
member.summary:
Start a shape test against the
's bound where the entity can collide.
member.param: The dimensions how much the shape test will search from the source position.
The rotations in degree how much the dimension will be rotated before the shape test starts.
The rotation order in local space the dimentions will be rotated in.
What type of objects the shape test should intersect with.

Specify an
that the shape test should exclude, leave null for no entities ignored.
Specify options for the spape test.
member.value:
The shape test handle. If this method fails to create the shape test request because there are too many ongoing requests,
will return
on the handle struct.
